generatedArtifacts.label: No generated dependency/build artifacts are tracked
generatedArtifacts.remediation: Remove tracked generated artifacts (for example node_modules/ and packages/shared-contracts/dist/) from the integration branch or explicitly report a leader-owned blocker before release sign-off.

commands.label: Docker Compose production config validation
commands.stdout:
name: infra
services:
  api:
    depends_on:
      api-seed:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
      minio:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      API_PORT: "3000"
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://eah:change-me@postgres:5432/enterprise_agent_hub
      JWT_SECRET: change-me-before-deploy
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: minio
      MINIO_PORT: "9000"
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_SKILL_ASSET_BUCKET: skill-assets
      MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET: skill-packages
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - node -e "fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/health').then(r=>process.exit(r.ok?0:1)).catch(()=>process.exit(1))"
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 15s
      retries: 12
    image: enterprise-agent-hub-api:0.1.0-p1
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
  api-migrate:
    command:
      - npm
      - run
      - migrate
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://eah:change-me@postgres:5432/enterprise_agent_hub
    image: enterprise-agent-hub-api:0.1.0-p1
    networks:
      default: null
  api-seed:
    command:
      - npm
      - run
      - seed
    depends_on:
      api-migrate:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
      minio-init:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://eah:change-me@postgres:5432/enterprise_agent_hub
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: minio
      MINIO_PORT: "9000"
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET: skill-packages
    image: enterprise-agent-hub-api:0.1.0-p1
    networks:
      default: null
  minio:
    command:
      - server
      - /data
      - --console-address
      - :9001
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://localhost:9000/minio/health/live
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 10
    image: minio/minio:RELEASE.2024-12-18T13-15-44Z
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9000
        published: "9000"
        protocol: tcp
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9001
        published: "9001"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: minio_data
        target: /data
        volume: {}
  minio-init:
    depends_on:
      minio:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - ' mc alias set eah http://minio:9000 $${MINIO_ROOT_USER} $${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD} && mc mb --ignore-existing eah/$${MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET:-skill-packages} && mc mb --ignore-existing eah/$${MINIO_SKILL_ASSET_BUCKET:-skill-assets} '
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
      MINIO_SKILL_ASSET_BUCKET: skill-assets
      MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET: skill-packages
    image: minio/mc:RELEASE.2024-11-21T17-21-54Z
    networks:
      default: null
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: enterprise_agent_hub
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: change-me
      POSTGRES_USER: eah
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER} -d $${POSTGRES_DB}
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 10
    image: postgres:16.6-bookworm
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5432"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: p
...[truncated 738 chars]

commands.stdout:
name: infra
services:
  api:
    depends_on:
      minio:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
      postgres:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
      redis:
        condition: service_started

    environment:

      JWT_SECRET: change-me-before-deploy

      MINIO_PORT: "9000"
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_SKILL_ASSET_BUCKET: skill-assets
      MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET: skill-packages

    image: enterprise-agent-hub-api:0.1.0-p1
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
  api-migrate:
    command:
      - npm
      - run
      - migrate
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://eah:change-me@postgres:5432/enterprise_agent_hub
    image: enterprise-agent-hub-api:0.1.0-p1
    networks:
      default: null
  api-seed:
    command:
      - npm
      - run
      - seed
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://eah:change-me@postgres:5432/enterprise_agent_hub
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: minio
      MINIO_PORT: "9000"
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET: skill-packages
    image: enterprise-agent-hub-api:0.1.0-p1
    networks:
      default: null
  minio:
    command:
      - server
      - /data
      - --console-address
      - :9001
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
    image: minio/minio:RELEASE.2024-12-18T13-15-44Z
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9000
        published: "9000"
        protocol: tcp
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9001
        published: "9001"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: minio_data
        target: /data
        volume: {}
  minio-init:
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - ' mc alias set eah http://minio:9000 $${MINIO_ROOT_USER} $${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD} && mc mb --ignore-existing eah/$${MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET:-skill-packages} && mc mb --ignore-existing eah/$${MINIO_SKILL_ASSET_BUCKET:-skill-assets} '
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: change-me-minio-secret
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
      MINIO_SKILL_ASSET_BUCKET: skill-assets
      MINIO_SKILL_PACKAGE_BUCKET: skill-packages
    image: minio/mc:RELEASE.2024-11-21T17-21-54Z
    networks:
      default: null
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: enterprise_agent_hub
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: change-me
      POSTGRES_USER: eah
    image: postgres:16.6-bookworm
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5432"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: postgres_data
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
  redis:
    command:
      - redis-server
      - --appendonly
      - "yes"
    image: redis:7.4.1-bookworm
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 6379
        published: "6379"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: redis_data
        target: /data
        volume: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: infra_default
volumes:
  minio_data:
    name: infra_minio_data
  postgres_data:
    name: infra_postgres_data
  redis_data:
    name: infra_redis_data

commands.label: P1 real delivery static regression checks
commands.stdout:
✔ Desktop client defaults to the real API surface and does not auto-fallback to seed data (0.34625ms)
✔ Tauri bridge only permits local command mocks behind an explicit env flag (0.093583ms)
✔ Desktop login defaults do not hardcode demo credentials in the product UI (0.070917ms)
✔ Tauri packaging config exposes Windows installer intent and command registration (0.254833ms)
✔ Desktop install flow passes download-ticket into Tauri and restores local state from SQLite bootstrap (0.532125ms)
✔ React desktop app is split into shell, pages, modals, and UI placeholder contracts (0.174459ms)
✔ Domain types now support prototype pages, modal state, preferences, and pending action errors (0.061166ms)
✔ API production image uses compiled migrate and seed scripts instead of ts-node (0.036666ms)
✔ Live smoke scripts exist for real source-start API verification (0.095625ms)
✔ Publishing and review client routes are wired to the live API (0.095ms)
✔ Desktop runtime does not import ui-prototype as executable code (0.073375ms)

ℹ pass 11

ℹ cancelled 0
